$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor completion and validation.

outputPath.description: Output file path. Relative paths are resolved against the repository root.

outputFile.description: Legacy alias for outputPath. outputPath takes precedence when both are set.

maxConsoleLines.description: Number of prompt lines to preview in the console.

includeUntracked.description: Whether to include new and untracked files in the generated prompt.

maxNewFileSizeBytes.description: Maximum size, in bytes, of a new or untracked file to include.

maxBuffer.description: Maximum child_process exec buffer size, in bytes, for Git commands.

promptTemplate.description: Inline prompt template. Supports placeholders such as {{diff}}, {{now}}, {{repoRoot}}, and {{prTemplate}}.

promptTemplateFile.description: Path to a prompt template file. Relative paths are resolved against the repository root.

templatePreset.description: Built-in prompt template preset name. Known presets are default, minimal, and ja.

excludeFile.description: Path to a file that lists Git pathspec-style exclude patterns, one per line. This is not a Git ignore-format file. Relative paths are resolved against the repository root.

gitignoreFile.description: Path to a Git ignore-format file interpreted by Git, such as .gitignore. Relative paths are resolved against the repository root.

includePrTemplate.description: Whether to search for and embed pull_request_template.md content.

prTemplateFile.description: Path to a pull request template file. Relative paths are resolved against the repository root.
